Click "}, {"text": "Set up Shipping Carrier Based Pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " so that your site can display live rates linked to your eParcel account."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000KS8umMAD.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000KS8umMAD.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Set up Australia Post eParcel and On Demand Shipping 2.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A confirmation box will appear asking that you have the relevant information to set up your shipping option. "}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Australia Post On Demand services will appear here."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000KS8xgMAD.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000KS8xgMAD.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Set up Australia Post eParcel and On Demand Shipping 4.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000KS8axMAD.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000KS8axMAD.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "Set up Australia Post eParcel and On Demand Shipping 5.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You now have the option to rename your shipping options, and add descriptions that will show to customers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Make any edits you want, and click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set if the shipping options should "}, {"text": "Show To Customers And Staff", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Show To Staff Only", "bold": true}, {"text": " (for creating orders manually). Files with Australian public holiday dates can be found "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://data.gov.au/data/dataset/australian-holidays-machine-readable-dataset", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000KS6ITMA1.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000KS6ITMA1.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Set up Australia Post eParcel and On Demand Shipping 12.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and your cut off time and ETAs will be set."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
